item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct judgment mode and did not fire triage or an over-methodized runtime despite the prompt mentioning a third issue. It gave a clear first-sentence recommendation, then bounded the decision with practical conditions and a smallest-necessary process change. This satisfies the negative-control expectation that prior local repairs below the hard gate should not trigger triage."}
